          }
        }

        function shouldCloseLoading() {
          // 是否需要手动控制关闭
          if (disableAutoCloseLoading) return false;
          disableAutoCloseLoading = document.getElementById('__disable-auto-close-loading');
          if (disableAutoCloseLoading) return false;

          // DOM 准备就绪
          const domReady = document.readyState === 'complete' || document.readyState === 'interactive';

          // React 根节点有内容
          const rootElement = document.getElementById('root');
          const hasContent = rootElement && rootElement.children.length > 0;

          // 检查是否有实际的 React 组件渲染
          const hasReactContent = rootElement && rootElement.innerHTML.trim().length > 50; // 有足够的内容;

          return domReady && hasContent && hasReactContent;
        }

        function autoCloseLoading() {
          if (closed) return;

          if (shouldCloseLoading()) {
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        }

        // 开始检测
        checkTimer = setInterval(autoCloseLoading, checkInterval);

        // 超时保护
        setTimeout(function () {
          if (!closed) {
            console.warn('[AutoLoading] 超时强制关闭 Loading');
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        }, maxWaitTime);

        // 暴露手动关闭接口
        window.__closeLoading = function () {
          if (!closed) {
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        };
      })();
    </script>

    <script>
      (function () {
        var hostname = (location.hostname || '').toLowerCase();
        var previewHosts = ["localhost","127.0.0.1",".ts.net",".vercel.lvrt.dev"];
        var isPreviewLikeHost = previewHosts.some(function (pattern) {
          return hostname.includes(pattern);
        });
        if (!isPreviewLikeHost) return;

        // 运行时环境解析,优先级: URL ?env= > localStorage shell:env > 构建时默认值
        var buildEnv = 'online';
        var searchParams = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
        var queryEnv = searchParams.get('env');
        var storedEnv = null;
        try { storedEnv = localStorage.getItem('shell:env'); } catch (_e) {}
        var envName = queryEnv || storedEnv || buildEnv;

        var isOnline = envName === 'online';
        var bgColor = isOnline ? '#ef4444' : '#3b82f6';

        var indicator = document.createElement('div');
        indicator.id = 'env-indicator';
        indicator.textContent = envName;
        indicator.style.cssText =
          'position:fixed;left:0;top:56px;z-index:10000;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:white;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);background-color:' +

        indicator.onclick = function () {
          if (window.__OPEN_DEBUG_PANEL__) {
            window.__OPEN_DEBUG_PANEL__();
          }
        };
        document.body.appendChild(indicator);
      })();
    </script>

    <!-- New Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->
    <noscript
      ><iframe
        src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WX5X6NS2"
        height="0"
        width="0"
        style="display: none; visibility: hidden"
      ></iframe
    ></noscript>
    <!-- End New Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->

    <script>
      // page start time
      window.pageStartTime = Date.now();

      // 自动 Loading 管理
      (function () {
        let closed = false;
        let checkTimer = null;
        let disableAutoCloseLoading = null;
        const maxWaitTime = 10000; // 10秒超时
        const checkInterval = 100; // 100ms检测一次

        function closeLoading() {
          const loadingContainer = document.getElementById('lovart-loading-container');
          if (loadingContainer) {
            document.body.removeChild(loadingContainer);
          }
        }

        function shouldCloseLoading() {
          // 是否需要手动控制关闭
          if (disableAutoCloseLoading) return false;
          disableAutoCloseLoading = document.getElementById('__disable-auto-close-loading');
          if (disableAutoCloseLoading) return false;

          // DOM 准备就绪
          const domReady = document.readyState === 'complete' || document.readyState === 'interactive';

          // React 根节点有内容
          const rootElement = document.getElementById('root');
          const hasContent = rootElement && rootElement.children.length > 0;

          // 检查是否有实际的 React 组件渲染
          const hasReactContent = rootElement && rootElement.innerHTML.trim().length > 50; // 有足够的内容;

          return domReady && hasContent && hasReactContent;
        }

        function autoCloseLoading() {
          if (closed) return;

          if (shouldCloseLoading()) {
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        }

        // 开始检测
        checkTimer = setInterval(autoCloseLoading, checkInterval);

        // 超时保护
        setTimeout(function () {
          if (!closed) {
            console.warn('[AutoLoading] 超时强制关闭 Loading');
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        }, maxWaitTime);

        // 暴露手动关闭接口
        window.__closeLoading = function () {
          if (!closed) {
            closed = true;
            clearInterval(checkTimer);
            closeLoading();
          }
        };
      })();
    </script>
    <!-- root -->
    <div id="root" class="light"></div>
    <div
      id="lovart-loading-container"
      style="position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 9999; background-color: rgb(243, 244, 245)"
    >
      <img
        src="https://web-static3.lovart.ai/lovart_assets/loadingLottie-v2.gif"
        width="60"
        height="60"
        style="position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); user-select: none"
      />
    </div>
    <!-- 环境指示器 - 本地/预览显示,运行时解析环境(和 config-runtime 优先级一致) -->
    <script>
      (function () {
        var hostname = (location.hostname || '').toLowerCase();
        var previewHosts = ["localhost","127.0.0.1",".ts.net",".vercel.lvrt.dev"];
        var isPreviewLikeHost = previewHosts.some(function (pattern) {
          return hostname.includes(pattern);
        });
        if (!isPreviewLikeHost) return;

        // 运行时环境解析,优先级: URL ?env= > localStorage shell:env > 构建时默认值
        var buildEnv = 'online';
        var searchParams = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
        var queryEnv = searchParams.get('env');
        var storedEnv = null;
        try { storedEnv = localStorage.getItem('shell:env'); } catch (_e) {}
        var envName = queryEnv || storedEnv || buildEnv;

        var isOnline = envName === 'online';
        var bgColor = isOnline ? '#ef4444' : '#3b82f6';

        var indicator = document.createElement('div');
        indicator.id = 'env-indicator';
        indicator.textContent = envName;
        indicator.style.cssText =
          'position:fixed;left:0;top:56px;z-index:10000;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:white;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);background-color:' +
          bgColor;
        indicator.title = '点击打开调试面板';
        indicator.onclick = function () {
          if (window.__OPEN_DEBUG_PANEL__) {
            window.__OPEN_DEBUG_PANEL__();
          }
        };
        document.body.appendChild(indicator);
      })();
    </script>
